org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network

Class NetworkMessageTransportService

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.MessageTransportService
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network.NetworkMessageTransportService
  • Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class NetworkMessageTransportService
extends MessageTransportService
    This components extends the basic Message Transport Service with a network support.

    This implementation of a MTS is able to communicated with other network MTS, ie other kernels.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>
